title: Login button not responding on mobile app
description: When I tap the login button on Android, nothing happens. iOS works fine. Already tried clearing cache and reinstalling.

title: Payment failed but money was deducted
description: Tried to upgrade to premium plan, got error 'transaction declined' but my bank shows money was taken.

title: Cannot upload profile picture
description: Every time I try to change my avatar it says 'file too large' even though it's only 180 KB.

title: Feature request: Dark mode for web version
description: Love the product but staring at white background at night hurts my eyes. Dark mode would be amazing.

title: Account suspended without reason
description: My account was suddenly suspended. I didn't receive any email or notification. Need urgent help.

title: Notifications not working anymore
description: Stopped receiving push notifications and email alerts about new messages 3 days ago.

title: Refund request for annual subscription
description: I accidentally renewed for another year. Please cancel and refund if possible.

title: Search is extremely slow
description: Searching for anything takes 8–12 seconds. Used to be instant. Happening on both app and browser.

title: Two-factor authentication setup failed
description: QR code scanning works but then it says 'invalid code' when I enter the 6-digit number.

title: Billing address cannot be updated
description: Keep getting 'invalid format' error when trying to change billing address.

title: App keeps crashing on iPhone 15
description: Crashes every time I open the chat screen. No issue on iPad or Android.

title: Wrong currency displayed in checkout
description: Shows SGD but I'm in Malaysia and want MYR. No option to change.

title: Cannot attach files larger than 5MB
description: Error says max 25MB but anything above 5MB fails to upload.

title: Ticket closed automatically – issue not solved
description: My previous ticket #987 was closed after 72 hours but problem still exists.

title: Request to delete my account
description: Please permanently delete my account and all associated data.

title: Team inbox not syncing new messages
description: New customer messages are not appearing in the team dashboard for the past 4 hours.

title: Video call quality very poor
description: Constant freezing and pixelation even with good internet (300 Mbps).

title: Incorrect subscription expiry date
description: Dashboard shows expiry in 3 days but I renewed last week for another year.

title: Language switcher not saving preference
description: Every time I change to Chinese it reverts to English after refresh.

title: Cannot reset password – email never arrives
description: Requested password reset 3 times. Nothing in inbox or spam folder.
